Lines added: 149, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,149 @@
- 
+ <!DOCTYPE html>
+ <html lang="en">
+ <head>
+     <meta charset="UTF-8">
+     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
+     <title>PPL Energy Savings Game - Embed</title>
+     <style>
+         /* Reset and base styles */
+         * {
+             margin: 0;
+             padding: 0;
+             box-sizing: border-box;
+         }
+ 
+         body {
+             font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
+             background: #f5f5f5;
+             margin: 0;
+             padding: 0;
+             min-height: 100vh;
+             display: flex;
+             align-items: center;
+             justify-content: center;
+         }
+ 
+         /* Container for the iframe */
+         .embed-container {
+             width: 100%;
+             max-width: 1200px;
+             margin: 0 auto;
+             padding: 20px;
+             background: #ffffff;
+             border-radius: 12px;
+             box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
+         }
+ 
+         /* Responsive iframe wrapper */
+         .iframe-wrapper {
+             position: relative;
+             width: 100%;
+             height: 0;
+             padding-bottom: 100%; /* 1:1 aspect ratio by default */
+             overflow: hidden;
+             border-radius: 8px;
+             background: #BA4A00; /* PPL orange background */
+         }
+ 
+         /* The iframe itself */
+         .game-iframe {
+             position: absolute;
+             top: 0;
+             left: 0;
+             width: 100%;
+             height: 100%;
+             border: none;
+             border-radius: 8px;
+         }
+ 
+         /* Responsive breakpoints based on the game's CSS */
+         @media (min-width: 1200px) {
+             .iframe-wrapper {
+                 padding-bottom: 75%; /* 4:3 aspect ratio for larger screens */
+             }
+         }
+ 
+         @media (max-width: 768px) {
+             .embed-container {
+                 padding: 15px;
+                 margin: 10px;
+             }
+             
+             .iframe-wrapper {
+                 padding-bottom: 120%; /* Taller aspect ratio for mobile */
+             }
+         }
+ 
+         @media (max-width: 480px) {
+             .embed-container {
+                 padding: 10px;
+                 margin: 5px;
+             }
+             
+             .iframe-wrapper {
+                 padding-bottom: 140%; /* Even taller for small mobile */
+             }
+         }
+ 
+         /* Loading state */
+         .loading {
+             position: absolute;
+             top: 50%;
+             left: 50%;
+             transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
+             color: #ffffff;
+             font-size: 18px;
+             font-weight: 500;
+         }
+ 
+         /* Optional: Add a subtle border to the container */
+         .embed-container {
+             border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
+         }
+ 
+         /* Focus styles for accessibility */
+         .game-iframe:focus {
+             outline: 2px solid #0071A8;
+             outline-offset: 2px;
+         }
+     </style>
+ </head>
+ <body>
+     <div class="embed-container">
+         <div class="iframe-wrapper">
+             <iframe 
+                 src="index.html" 
+                 class="game-iframe"
+                 title="PPL Energy Savings Game"
+                 allow="fullscreen"
+                 loading="lazy"
+                 sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups allow-presentation">
+                 <p>Your browser does not support iframes. <a href="index.html" target="_blank">Open the game in a new tab</a>.</p>
+             </iframe>
+             <div class="loading">Loading game...</div>
+         </div>
+     </div>
+ 
+     <script>
+         // Remove loading message when iframe loads
+         document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
+             const iframe = document.querySelector('.game-iframe');
+             const loading = document.querySelector('.loading');
+             
+             iframe.addEventListener('load', function() {
+                 if (loading) {
+                     loading.style.display = 'none';
+                 }
+             });
+ 
+             // Fallback: hide loading after 5 seconds
+             setTimeout(function() {
+                 if (loading) {
+                     loading.style.display = 'none';
+                 }
+             }, 5000);
+         });
+     </script>
+ </body>
+ </html>
+ 
```

</details>

---

Perfect! I've created a responsive iframe embed page in `embed.html` that will contain your PPL Energy Savings Game. Here's what I've included:

## Key Features:

1. **Responsive Design**: The iframe adapts to different screen sizes with appropriate aspect ratios:
   - Desktop (1200px+): 4:3 aspect ratio
   - Mobile (768px and below): 120% height ratio
   - Small mobile (480px and below): 140% height ratio

2. **Professional Styling**: 
   - Clean white container with subtle shadow
   - PPL orange background for the iframe wrapper
   - Rounded corners and modern design

3. **Accessibility**: 
   - Proper title attribute for screen readers
   - Focus styles for keyboard navigation
   - Fallback content for browsers that don't support iframes

4. **Security**: 
   - Sandbox attributes to control iframe permissions
   - Allows necessary features like scripts and same-origin access

5. **Loading State**: 
   - Shows "Loading game..." message while the iframe loads
   - Automatically hides when the game is ready
   - Fallback timeout after 5 seconds

6. **Cross-browser Compatibility**: 
   - Uses modern CSS with fallbacks
   - Works on all major browsers

The embed page is now ready to use! You can open `embed.html` in a browser to see your game embedded in a responsive container. The iframe will automatically adjust its size based on the screen size while maintaining the proper aspect ratios for optimal viewing.

Perfect! I've made the following adjustments to fix both issues:

## Height Fix:
- **Desktop (1200px+)**: Reduced from 75% to **50%** padding-bottom (much shorter)
- **Default**: Reduced from 100% to **60%** padding-bottom 
- **Tablets (768px)**: Changed to 100% (square aspect ratio)
- **Mobile (480px)**: Kept at 120% to ensure all content is visible on small screens

## Why the PPL logo wasn't visible:
The game has a specific layout with the PPL logo positioned at the bottom right corner. With the previous very tall aspect ratio, the logo was likely getting cut off at the bottom. The new shorter aspect ratios should allow the full game content including the logo to be visible.

The new aspect ratios are:
- **Large desktop**: 50% (much more reasonable height)
- **Desktop**: 60% (still shorter than before)
- **Tablet**: 100% (square, good for medium screens)
- **Mobile**: 120% (tall enough to show all content)

This should give you a much more reasonable height on desktop while ensuring the PPL logo is visible at the bottom of the game!
